TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Rangay ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 20 buwan, 56 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 55 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Rangay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Rangay hya' ga Kinyawpan. tay 'llaw na Rangay hya' ga Triqan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ raŋaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa kinjawpan. taj ʔllaw na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa triqan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Rangay ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 20 buwan, 56 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 98% kyan ku 55 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 2% kyan ku 1 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, binah lihuyan s'uli 7%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Rangay hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Rangay hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Rangay hya' ga Kinyawpan. tay 'llaw na Rangay hya' ga Triqan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ raŋaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa kinjawpan. taj ʔllaw na raŋaj ħjaʔ ɣa triqan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
